content: {"file": "src/core/render3/view-refresh.ts", "summary": "This file contains functions for rendering and detecting changes in Angular views. It includes methods to render components, embedded views, and perform change detection on views and their child components.", "rules": [{"name": "Ensure Change Detection Mode", "description": "Detect changes only if the view is attached to a change detector or marked for refresh.", "conditions": ["viewAttachedToChangeDetector(lView)", "(flags & 16) || (flags & 64 && mode === 0 && !isInCheckNoChangesPass)"], "actions": ["refreshView(tView, lView, tView.template, lView[CONTEXT])"]}, {"name": "Execute Template Functions", "description": "Executes template functions during view refresh and change detection.", "conditions": ["templateFn !== null"], "actions": ["executeTemplate(tView, lView, templateFn, 2, context2)"]}], "dependencies": ["src/core/render3/view.ts", "src/core/linker/view_container_ref.ts", "src/core/change_detection/parse_util.ts", "src/core/di/injector.ts", "src/core/render3/interfaces/renderer.ts", "src/core/render3/interfaces/view_engine.ts", "src/core/render3/util.ts"]}
